arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel warns one of England's biggest stars they could miss out on World Cup squad
arts.sum: England are spoilt for choice in the forward line but Thomas Tuchel can only fit so many into his squad for the World Cup, with the Three Lions set to continue qualification against Latvia on Monday

arts.ttl: Declan Rice shares true feelings on Thomas Tuchel's brutally honest England comments
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel kicked off his England reign with a win over Albania and Declan Rice is all for the German dishing out some home truths if it helps England win the World Cup

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel lays down law to Mikel Arteta and Premier League rivals over England stars
arts.sum: England are due to take on Latvia on Monday as manager Thomas Tuchel looks to keep up his winning start and the boss has some important selection decisions to make

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel warns he will not rotate England team to benefit clubs
arts.sum: Head coach wants to ‘raise standards’ against Latvia Tuchel says he ‘won’t take any unprofessional risks’ Thomas Tuchel will risk the wrath of club managers by starting their players twice in the space of four days during the international break. England’s new head coach is focused on raising standards before the World Cup qualifier against Latvia on Monday night and he believes it would send out the wrong signal if he rotates for the sake of it, even with the domestic season reaching a defining stage. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Tuchel bringing the blunt honesty Southgate lacked in pursuit of England glory
arts.sum: Tuchel is transforming England’s style of leadership as he tries to finally get them over the line in a major tournament

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel promises to take hard line in club vs country row over England players
arts.sum: Tuchel has laid his marker over possibly resting players when they are on England duty

arts.ttl: Tuchel 'not afraid' to make changes as injured Gordon withdraws
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel will make changes for Monday's World Cup qualifier against Latvia, while Anthony Gordon has been ruled out through injury.

arts.ttl: 'Unbelievable' Kane can get 100 England goals - Rice
arts.sum: Declan Rice praises Harry Kane and says the England captain can make it to100 goals for his country as they prepare for their World Cup qualifying match against Latvia.

arts.ttl: Henderson: Hired a van to watch England at Euros
arts.sum: Jordan Henderson has revealed that he drove to Germany in a van to watch England at last summer's European Championship final after missing out on a call-up.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane release clause, Liverpool transfer interest and stance on Premier League return
arts.sum: Harry Kane has constantly been linked with a return to the Premier League since signing for German giants Bayern Munich and Liverpool are now among the contenders to sign him
